title: iPredict
summary: An IoT-based predictive maintenance system that analyzes machine sensor data to reduce unexpected failures.
overview: iPredict ingests vibration, temperature, and humidity data to forecast machine risk and extend machine life.
problem: Industrial machines often fail unexpectedly when sensor patterns are not monitored and modeled proactively.
role: Built Python-based sensor analysis and forecasting workflows for predictive maintenance.
Worked across data preprocessing, model experimentation, and maintenance-oriented outputs.
architecture: Sensor ingestion and preprocessing for vibration, temperature, humidity, and sound data.
Forecasting pipeline using ARIMA and LSTM models for failure prediction.
MQTT and HTTP transmission flow with anomaly alerting for maintenance workflows.

results.title: Operational objective
results.detail: Increase machine longevity and reduce unplanned downtime through predictive insights.

lessonsLearned: Reliable predictive outputs depend on sensor quality, preprocessing discipline, and clear maintenance decision thresholds.
